GM:(0,0,0)  L:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  LA:(1/2,-1/2,1/2)  T:(1,0,0)  Y:(0,1,0)  Z:(0,0,1)
GM:(0,0,0)  L:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  V:(1/2,1/2,0)  M:(0,1,1/2)  A:(0,0,1/2)  Y:(0,1,0)
GM1+  GM1-  GM2+  GM2-  GM4  GM6  GM3  GM5  L1+  L1-  L3  L2  (LA)V1+  (LA)V1-  (LA)V3  (LA)V2  (T)M1+  (T)M1-  (T)M2+  (T)M2-  (T)M4  (T)M6  (T)M3  (T)M5  (Y)A1+  (Y)A1-  (Y)A2+  (Y)A2-  (Y)A4  (Y)A6  (Y)A3  (Y)A5  (Z)Y1+  (Z)Y1-  (Z)Y2+  (Z)Y2-  (Z)Y4  (Z)Y6  (Z)Y3  (Z)Y5
